customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high warmth. Terry is a retired minister with health-driven early retirement and a fixed-income posture. He is actively shopping (church referral competitor in play) but is genuinely open and self-described as 'the best deal gets the cookies.' No scam skepticism, no hostility.
unresolved_concerns: Wife is on the title and answered every financial question on the setter call — she was never confirmed as a participant in Monday's appointment. Closer must confirm she is present before proceeding.
Active competitor in play: a church-referral company that a church friend already used. Social trust is working in the competitor's favor. Closer should acknowledge the comparison context early.
Terry is planning tree removal after a windstorm and flagged that additional trimming may be needed depending on the solar design. Shading assessment is a live concern for him.
sensitive_topics_raised: Health issues leading to early retirement — Terry mentioned this in passing; he is on fixed income.
Ministry background — forty years with the Church of the Nazarene. Terry is warm to faith-based rapport but this should not be manufactured.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment confirmed for Monday, March 23 at 2PM.
Bucky stated he would put a note in about the tree trimming concern.
Bucky personally recommended the 'bill swap program' (lease/financed option) as what he would do — Terry acknowledged this and may walk in expecting that framing.
closer_should_know: The wife is the financial voice in this household — she answered the bill amount, credit score, and bill delivery method on the setter call and was never confirmed on the Monday appointment. Do not proceed without her on the line. Also: Bucky recommended the bill swap (financed) option by name; Terry may arrive with a pre-formed preference. Present both options neutrally before anchoring.
